title: Aurora, 01795, Avery Teddy Bear, Eco-friendly soft toy, Taupe
features: From Aurora's highly popular Teddy Bear Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
Eco-friendly with filling and beans made from recycled plastics
description: Avery Teddy Bear is a beautiful, traditional looking plush Taupe bear. Avery has a gorgeous super soft cuddy body which makes you want to share lots of hugs. Avery makes the perfect gift for anyone who loves teddy bears and plush soft toys. Avery Bear is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
